===Temporary===
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Gladion
|pkmn=Lunala
|type1=Psychic
|type2=Ghost
|img=Lunala anime.png
|cap=Lunala
|epnum=SM087
|epname=Filling the Light with Darkness!
|main=Lunala (anime)
|desc=The Ultra Guardians assisted {{p|Lunala}} during its battle with {{an|Necrozma}}. After being freed from Necrozma's control with the help of [[Ash's Solgaleo|Nebby]], Lunala crashed onto a beach on [[Melemele Island]]. After fending off [[Matori]] and her [[Matori Matrix]], Lunala was brought to the Ultra Guardians base, where, with the combined light of the [[Z-Ring]]s belonging to Ash, Kiawe, Lana, and Gladion, Lunala made a full recovery. Lunala later teamed up with Gladion to help provide enough light for Necrozma to restore its Ultra form using its [[Z-Move]], {{m|Menacing Moonraze Maelstrom}}.}}
